} .accent { background: var(--accent); } .danger { background: var(--red-deep) !important; color: #fff !important; } .bordered { border: 1px solid var(--accent); } .dotted-line { border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--accent); } .dotted-line:hover { cursor: help; } .flex { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: var(--gap); } .box { flex: 1 1 auto; padding: 1rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); margin-block-start: 0; min-width: 10em !important; /* default to .flex-third */ flex-basis: calc(33.3% - 3rem); } .auto { /* flex: 0 0 auto; max-width: none; */ flex: 1 0 max-content; min-width: max-content; max-width: 100%; } /* padding override?

*/ .box:has(> form:first-child) { padding: 0; } .box > :first-child { margin-top: 0; padding-top: 0; } .card { border-radius: var(--border-radius); padding: .3rem .5rem; } .card-label { display: block; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold; font-size: 90%; margin-bottom: .5em; } .tight .box { flex: 0 0 auto !important; min-width: auto !important; } .flex-full, .flex-full .box { flex-basis: calc(100%); } .flex-half, .flex-half .box { flex-basis: calc(50% - var(--gap)); } .flex-third, .flex-third .box { flex-basis: calc(33.3% - calc(var(--gap) * 2)); } .flex-fourth, .flex-fourth .box { flex-basis: calc(25% - calc(var(--gap) * 3)); min-width: 5em !important; } .flex-fifth, .flex-fifth .box { flex-basis: calc(20% - calc(var(--gap) * 4)); min-width: 5em !important; } .basis-5em { flex-basis: 5em; } .basis-10em { flex-basis: 10em; } .basis-15em { flex-basis: 15em; } .basis-20em { flex-basis: 20em; } .basis-25em { flex-basis: 25em; } /* spaced */ .flex.spaced { --gap: 4rem; gap: var(--gap); margin-top: var(--gap); } .flex-half.spaced, .flex-half.spaced .box { --gap: 4rem; flex-basis: calc(50% - var(--gap)); } .flex-third, .flex-third .box { flex-basis: calc(33.3% - calc(var(--gap) * 2)); } .flex-fourth, .flex-fourth .box { flex-basis: calc(25% - calc(var(--gap) * 3)); min-width: 5em !important; } .flex-fifth, .flex-fifth .box { flex-basis: calc(20% - calc(var(--gap) * 4)); min-width: 5em !important; } .smcp, .caps { font-size: 80%; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05ch; } summary:hover { cursor: pointer; } /* details:last-of-type summary { list-style: none; &::before { font-weight: normal; content: "\f0da"; width: 1.2ch; display: inline-block; padding-right: .3rem; } [open] &::before { font-weight: normal; content: "\f0d7"; width: 1.2ch; display: inline-block; } } details:last-of-type summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } */ details summary { list-style: none; &::before { font-weight: normal; content: "\f0da"; width: 1.2ch; display: inline-block; padding-right: .3rem; } [open] &::before { font-weight: normal; content: "\f0d7"; width: 1.2ch; display: inline-block; } } details summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } svg { fill: light-dark(var(--fg), var(--bg)); } /* [hidden] { display: none !important; } */ a svg { padding-right: .2em; fill: currentcolor; } footer svg { fill: var(--fg); height: 1.7em !important; } body * + * { margin-block-start: 1.2em; } li, body, header, main, nav { margin-block-start: unset; } blockquote { position: relative; padding-left: 1.8rem; } blockquote::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 1rem; background: var(--accent-contrast); border-radius: var(--border-radius); } /* Description Lists */ dt { margin: 0; } dd { margin: inherit; margin: 0; margin-top: .5em; margin-bottom: 1em; } dt:before { content: "\25ca\0020"; margin-left: 0.2rem; } dt { font-weight: bold !important; } .icon { height: 1em; vertical-align: middle; margin: -.25em .25em 0 0; display: inline-block; overflow: visible; } a:link, a:visited, a:hover, a:active { color: light-dark(oklch(44% 0.15 245), oklch(72% 0.12 245)); text-decoration-color: inherit; text-decoration-thickness: .1ch; text-underline-offset: 1.5px; } a:visited { color: light-dark(oklch(42% 0.14 295), oklch(70% 0.11 295)); } header a:link, header a:visited, header a:hover, header a:active, footer a:link, footer a:visited, footer a:hover, footer a:active, .box a:link, .box a:visited, .box a:hover, .box a:active { color: inherit; } h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-family: 'Neatnik', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; } header :is(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6) a { text-decoration: none; } :is(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6) a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--text) !important; background-color: inherit; } :is(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6) a:hover { text-decoration: underline; color: inherit !important; } header :is(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6) a:hover { text-decoration: none; } :is(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6) { margin-block-start: 0.75em; padding-top: 0.75em; background-color: inherit; } h1 { font-size: 170%; } h2 { font-size: 130%; } h3 { font-size: 115%; } h4, h5, h6 { font-size: 110%; } p, li { line-height: 1.47; } body * { border: 0px dotted orange; } header { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 10em; max-width: 15em; } header h1 { font-family: 'Neatnik', sans-serif; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -.01em; } header svg { margin-top: 1em; width: 4.5em !important; } header h1:first-of-type, main h1:first-of-type { margin-block-start: 0; padding-top: 0; } header nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 1em; font-size: 90%; } header nav ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; } header nav .active::before { font-family: "Neatnik" !important; content: "→"; margin-left: -1.15em; } header nav .sub::before { font-family: "Neatnik" !important; content: "\21B3"; margin-left: .2em; } header nav .active a { font-weight: bold; } header nav ul a { text-decoration: none; } footer ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } footer li { display: inline-block; margin-right: .75rem; } main { flex: 1 1 50em; max-width: 50em; background-color: inherit; } p:has(> img:first-child) { max-width: 100%; } footer { color: var(--fg) !important; font-size: 0.9em; padding-top: 3rem; } footer hr { border: 0; /*border-bottom: 1px solid light-dark(var(--secondary-light), var(--secondary-dark));*/ } footer hr:after { content: "***"; letter-spacing: .5em; font-size: 170%; } footer nav { margin-top: 2em; } img { border-radius: var(--border-radius); } .rule { border: none; height: 1px; background-color: var(--fg); margin: 3em 0 1em 0; } hr.spacer { padding: 0; border: none; margin: 2em 0 .5em 0; font-size: 0.9em; } hr.spacer:after { content: "***"; letter-spacing: .5em; font-size: 170%; } /* Legibility */ /* p, form { max-width: 60ch; } */ /* :is(p, form, .notice):not(:is(footer *)) { max-width: 60ch; } */ :is(p, li, form, details, .notice):not(:is(footer *, .full-width)) { max-width: 64ch; } .maxed { max-width: 64ch !important; } /* Notices */ .notice { position: relative; border-radius: var(--border-radius); padding: 1em; font-size: 96%; background: var(--accent); } .notice :is(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6) { padding-block-start: 0; } .notice > * { margin-left: 3.5rem; } .notice > :nth-child(2) { margin-block-start: 0; } .notice figcaption { border-top-left-radius: var(--border-radius); border-bottom-left-radius: var(--border-radius); background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); margin: 0; position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0; padding: .8em 0 0 .5em; } .notice p { line-height: 1.4; } .notice a { color: inherit !important; } .notice figcaption .icon { fill: var(--accent); opacity: .85; height: 2rem; margin: 0 .57em 0 .15em; } .notice { background: var(--blue); color: var(--black) } .notice.success { background: var(--green); color: var(--black) } .notice.caution { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black) } .notice.warning { background: var(--red); color: var(--black) } /*.notice.caution .icon { fill: var(--primary-light); }*/ .notice button, .notice .button { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .notice .button { color: var(--white) !important; } /* Code Stuff */ pre { white-space: pre-wrap; } code, kbd { /*background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);*/ background: light-dark(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.3)); /*background-color: color-mix(in oklch, currentColor 90%, black);*/ border-radius: var(--border-radius); padding: .1em .2em .1em .2em; overflow-wrap: break-word; word-wrap: break-word; } .mono, code, pre { font-family: 'Neatnik Mono', monospace !important; font-feature-settings: "ss01" off; font-size: 90%; } small, .small { font-size: 85%; line-height: 1.1 !important; } pre code { display: block; background: var(--black); color: var(--paper); padding: .75em; line-height: 1.5; border-radius: var(--border-radius); white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-word; overflow-wrap: anywhere; } pre .label { color: #ccc; padding: .5rem; } .align-left { text-align: left; } .align-center { text-align: center; } .align-right { text-align: right; } .right { float: right; } .left { float: left; } /* Lists */ ul { list-style: none; padding-left: 1em; } ol { list-style: digit; padding-left: 2em; } ul li::before { font-family: 'Neatnik Mono', monospace; content: "\2022"; line-height: 0; margin-right: .5em; } nav:not(:is(header *)) { margin: 1em 0 0 0; padding: 0em; border-radius: var(--border-radius); display: inline-block; /*border: 1.5px solid light-dark(var(--secondary-light), var(--secondary-dark));*/ /*background: light-dark(var(--blue-2), var(--blue-9));*/ } nav:not(:is(header *)) ul { margin: 0; padding: 0; } nav:not(:is(header *)) li { padding: 0; margin: 0; } nav:not(:is(header *)) a { color: inherit !important; } nav ul li::before { content: none; } footer ul li::before { content: none; } ol ol { list-style: lower-alpha; } ol ol ol { list-style: lower-roman; } ul ul li::before { opacity: .6; } ul ul ul li::before { opacity: .3; } /* Forms */ form { width: 100%; } form p { line-height: 1.3; } input[type="password"] { font-family: 'Neatnik Mono', monospace; } input, button, .action, fieldset, legend, label, option, select, textarea { -webkit-appearance: none; -moz-appearance: none; appearance: none; all: unset; font-family: inherit; } fieldset { margin: 2em 0 1em 0; padding: 0 1em 1em 1em; border-radius: var(--border-radius); width: calc(100% - 2em); background: var(--accent); position: relative; } fieldset legend { text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold; font-size: 90%; padding: .75em 1em; margin: 0; background: var(--accent); border-top-left-radius: calc(var(--border-radius) * 3); border-top-right-radius: calc(var(--border-radius) * 3); position: absolute; top: -1.75em; left: 0; } fieldset legend svg { padding-right: .2em; } label, .form-label { font-weight: bold; display: block; margin-bottom: .25em; } input, button, textarea { margin: 0; margin-right: 1em; padding: .5rem; border: 1.5px solid var(--accent-contrast) !important; border-radius: var(--border-radius); } input, textarea { display: block; width: calc(100% - 1em); } textarea { height: 5em; white-space: pre-wrap; } select { padding: .6em .5ch .5ch .5ch !important; } .nowrap { white-space: nowrap; } .wrap { white-space: normal; } .really-wrap { white-space: pre-wrap; overflow-wrap: anywhere; word-break: break-word; } label:hover { cursor: pointer; } /* input[type="text"], input[type="email"], input[type="password"] { width: calc(100% - 5ch); } */ input[type="checkbox"]:disabled + label { cursor: not-allowed; } select:hover { cursor: pointer; } input:disabled { opacity: .25; } input:disabled + label { opacity: .25; } input[type="checkbox"] { display: inline-block; width: 1em; height: 1.15em; padding: .07em .06em .02em .1em; margin-right: .5em; margin-top: -.1em; text-align: center; line-height: 1.1; vertical-align: middle; } input[type="checkbox"]:hover { cursor: pointer; } input[type="checkbox"]:checked::before { content: "╳"; } input[type="checkbox"]::before { content: "\00a0"; } input[type="checkbox"]:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; } input[type="checkbox"] + label { display: inline-block; } label + a { margin-left: .5em; } button, .button, .action, input[type="button"], input[type="submit"] { display: inline-block; background: var(--ink) !important; color: var(--white) !important; /*white-space: nowrap; */ font-weight: bold; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--white) 35%, transparent) inset, 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 18%, transparent); } /* Hover = slightly “closer” to you */ .button:hover, button:hover, input[type="button"]:hover, input[type="submit"]:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--white) 45%, transparent) inset, 0 3px 10px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 20%, transparent); } /* Active = pressed */ .button:active, button:active, input[type="button"]:active, input[type="submit"]:active { transform: translateY(0px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 12%, transparent) inset, 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 12%, transparent); } button, .button { border: none !important; border-radius: var(--border-radius); padding: .5rem 1rem; } .slim { padding: .3em .5em; font-size: 85%; } a.button { text-decoration: none; } button svg, .button svg, .action svg { fill: var(--white); padding-right: .25em; } button:hover, .button:hover, .action:hover { cursor: pointer; transition: filter .2s; } button, input[type="submit"] { border-radius: var(--border-radius); border: none; } button:hover, input[type="submit"]:hover { cursor: pointer; } /* Tables */ table { font-feature-settings: "tnum" on; } .table-wrapper { overflow-x: auto; max-width: calc(100vw - 2em) !important; } .table-wrapper table { /*min-width: 600px;*/ /* or max-content */ } table { border-collapse: collapse; } td, th { padding: .7em 1.5em .7em 0; border-bottom : 1px solid var(--accent); vertical-align: top; } .borderless td { border: 0; padding-bottom: 0; } .centered { text-align: center; } th { text-align: left; } /* Fancypants Stuff */ .code-label { display: inline-block; transform: translateX(.5em) translateY(2em); } p:has(.code-label) { margin: 0; padding: 0; } /* .sticky { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10; width: 100%; background-color: inherit; } */ .bottom { margin-top: auto; padding-top: 1em; } .box:has(.bottom) { flex-direction: column; display: flex; } .link { text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-style: solid; text-decoration-color: inherit; text-decoration-thickness: .1ch; text-underline-offset: 1.5px; } .anchor { margin-left: -1.2em; } /* .anchor .icon { height: .7em; } */ strong, .strong { font-weight: bold; } .tab { text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold; font-size: 90%; margin: 1em 0 -1em 0; } .break, .wrap { overflow-wrap: break-word; word-wrap: break-word; } sup { vertical-align: baseline; position: relative; top: -0.4em; } .pill { font-size: 70%; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: normal !important; background: var(--accent); padding: .2rem .3rem .1rem .3rem; margin: 0; margin-left: .2rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); display: inline-block; } .pill.bold { font-weight: bold !important; } .pill.mono { padding: .1rem .3rem .1rem .3rem; font-size: 95%; } .pill.full { font-size: 85%; } @view-transition { navigation: auto; } ::view-transition-old(root), ::view-transition-new(root) { animation-duration: 0.1s; animation-timing-function: ease-in-out; } /* Misc */ img { max-width: 100%; } /* Popover */ [popover] { max-width: 90vw; } input[type="checkbox"]:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; } input[type="checkbox"] + label { display: inline-block; } label + a { margin-left: .5em; } button, .button, .action, input[type="button"], input[type="submit"] { display: inline-block; } /* Hover = slightly “closer” to you */ .button:hover, button:hover, input[type="button"]:hover, input[type="submit"]:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--white) 45%, transparent) inset, 0 3px 10px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 20%, transparent); } /* Active = pressed */ .button:active, button:active, input[type="button"]:active, input[type="submit"]:active { transform: translateY(0px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 12%, transparent) inset, 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 12%, transparent); } button, .button { border: none !important; border-radius: var(--border-radius); padding: .5rem 1rem; } .slim { padding: .3em .5em; font-size: 85%; } a.button { text-decoration: none; } button svg, .button svg, .action svg { fill: var(--white); padding-right: .25em; } button:hover, .button:hover, .action:hover { cursor: pointer; transition: filter .2s; } button, input[type="submit"] { border-radius: var(--border-radius); border: none; } button:hover, input[type="submit"]:hover { cursor: pointer; } /* Tables */ table { font-feature-settings: "tnum" on; } .table-wrapper { overflow-x: auto; max-width: calc(100vw - 2em) !important; } .table-wrapper table { /*min-width: 600px;*/ /* or max-content */ } table { border-collapse: collapse; } td, th { padding: .7em 1.5em .7em 0; border-bottom : 1px solid var(--accent); vertical-align: top; } .borderless td { border: 0; padding-bottom: 0; } .centered { text-align: center; } th { text-align: left; } /* Fancypants Stuff */ .code-label { display: inline-block; transform: translateX(.5em) translateY(2em); } p:has(.code-label) { margin: 0; padding: 0; } /* .sticky { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10; width: 100%; background-color: inherit; } */ .bottom { margin-top: auto; padding-top: 1em; } .box:has(.bottom) { flex-direction: column; display: flex; } .link { text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-style: solid; text-decoration-color: inherit; text-decoration-thickness: .1ch; text-underline-offset: 1.5px; } .anchor { margin-left: -1.2em; } /* .anchor .icon { height: .7em; } */ strong, .strong { font-weight: bold; } .tab { text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold; font-size: 90%; margin: 1em 0 -1em 0; } .break, .wrap { overflow-wrap: break-word; word-wrap: break-word; } sup { vertical-align: baseline; position: relative; top: -0.4em; } .pill { font-size: 70%; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: normal !important; background: var(--accent); padding: .2rem .3rem .1rem .3rem; margin: 0; margin-left: .2rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); display: inline-block; } .pill.bold { font-weight: bold !important; } .pill.mono { padding: .1rem .3rem .1rem .3rem; font-size: 95%; } .pill.full { font-size: 85%; } @view-transition { navigation: auto; } ::view-transition-old(root), ::view-transition-new(root) { animation-duration: 0.1s; animation-timing-function: ease-in-out; } /* Misc */ img { max-width: 100%; } /* Popover */ [popover] { max-width: 90vw; max-height: 90vh; border-radius: var(--border-radius); margin: 2em auto; } [popover]:popover-open { display: block; background: none; box-shadow: 2px 5px 16px 0px var(--black), 5px 5px 15px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0); } [popover]::backdrop { backdrop-filter: none; } #message::backdrop { backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } /* Responsiveness */ @media (max-width: 1500px) { body { font-size: 1.3em; padding: 4rem; } } @media (max-width: 1000px) { body { font-size: 1.2em; padding: 3rem; } } @media (max-width: 800px) { body { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; padding: 2rem; } header, main { max-width: none; } header { text-align: left; } header nav { flex-direction: row; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 1em; } header svg { display: none; } header nav ul ul { display: none; } header nav ul { flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; } header nav li:not(:last-child)::after { content: "/"; color: var(--fg); padding-left: .5rem; } header nav .active::before, header nav .sub::before { content: none; } } @media (max-width: 640px) { .box { flex-basis: 100% !important; } } @media (max-width: 500px) { body { font-size: 1em; padding: 1rem; } .anchor { display: none; } } /* Other?
